metadata.description: Easily install a beta version of a plugin for testing.

text:"测试版主题的 GitHub 仓库："

regex.source: text:'The following is a list of beta plugins added via the command "Add a beta plugin for testing". You can chose to add the latest version or a frozen version. A frozen version is a specific release of a plugin based on its release tag.'
regex.target: text:'以下是通过“添加测试版插件”命令添加的测试版插件列表。你可以选择添加最新版本或固定版本。固定版本是基于其发布标签的特定插件版本。'

regex.source: text:"Removing from the list does not delete the plugin, this should be done from the Community Plugins tab in Settings."
regex.target: text:"从列表中移除不会删除插件，应在设置中的社区插件面板中进行删除。"
text:"你的 GitHub 账户设置"
.setText("测试版插件的 GitHub 仓库：")

regex.source: .setText("Enter a GitHub repository address to validate it.")
regex.target: .setText("输入 GitHub 仓库地址以进行验证。")

regex.source: .setText(`GitHub API rate limit exceeded. Try again in ${u.getMinutesToReset()} minutes.`)
regex.target: .setText(`GitHub API 速率限制已超出，请在 ${u.getMinutesToReset()} 分钟后重试。`)

regex.source: .setText("Repository not found. Check the address or provide a valid token for access to a private repository.")
regex.target: .setText("未找到仓库。请检查地址或提供有效的令牌以访问私有仓库。")

regex.source: .setText("Access denied. Check your personal access token.")
regex.target: .setText("访问被拒绝。请检查你的个人访问令牌。")

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled beta plugins will be automatically enabled after installtion by default. Note: you can toggle this on and off for each plugin in the "Add Plugin" form.')
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，测试版插件将在安装后默认自动启用。注意：你可以在‘添加插件’表单中为每个插件切换此设置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled all beta plugins will be checked for updates each time Obsidian starts. Note: this does not update frozen version plugins.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，每次 Obsidian 启动时将检查所有测试版插件的更新。注意：这不会更新固定版本的插件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled all beta themes will be checked for updates each time Obsidian starts.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，每次 Obsidian 启动时将检查所有测试版主题的更新。")

regex.source: .setDesc("BRAT will provide popup notifications for its various activities. Turn this off means  no notifications from BRAT.")
regex.target: .setDesc("BRAT 将为其各种活动提供弹窗通知。关闭此选项意味着 BRAT 不会发送通知。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Plugin updates will be logged to a file in the log file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("插件更新将被记录到日志文件中。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Logs will be saved to this file. Don't add .md to the file name.")
regex.target: .setDesc("日志将保存到此文件。不要在文件名中添加 .md。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Atomic Bomb level console logging. Can be used for troubleshoting and development.")
regex.target: .setDesc("原子弹级别的控制台日志记录。可用于故障排查和开发。")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder(`Type to search for a version for ${t}`)

regex.source: .Notice("Failed to read the daily note template")
"There is no theme.css or theme-beta.css file in the root path of this repository, so there is no theme to install."
regex.target: "此仓库的根路径中没有theme.css或theme-beta.css文件，因此没有可安装的主题。"

regex.source: "There is no manifest.json file in the root path of this repository, so theme cannot be installed."
regex.target: "此仓库的根路径中没有manifest.json文件，因此无法安装主题。"
从 ${cssGithubRepository} 安装了 ${manifestInfo.name} 主题。
从 ${cssGithubRepository} 更新了 ${manifestInfo.name} 主题。

regex.source: console.info("No custom daily note settings found!", err);
regex.target: console.info("未找到自定义每日笔记设置！", err);

regex.target: console.info("未找到自定义每周笔记设置！", err);

regex.target: console.info("未找到自定义每月笔记设置！", err);

regex.target: console.error(`无法读取每日笔记模板 '${templatePath}'`, err);

regex.source: Checking for beta theme updates STARTED
regex.target: 开始检查测试版主题更新

regex.source: Checking for beta theme updates COMPLETED
regex.target: 检查测试版主题更新完成

regex.source: Removed ${cssGithubRepository} from BRAT themes list and will no longer be updated. However, the theme files still exist in the vault. To remove them, go into Settings > Appearance and remove the theme.
regex.target: 已从BRAT主题列表中移除${cssGithubRepository}，并将不再进行更新。但是，主题文件仍存在于保险库中。要删除它们，请转到“设置”>“外观”并删除该主题。

regex.source: This theme is already in the list for beta testing
regex.target: 此主题已在测试版列表中

regex.source: This does not seem to be an obsidian plugin, as there is no manifest.json file.
regex.target: 这似乎不是一个Obsidian插件，因为没有找到manifest.json文件。

regex.source: The plugin id attribute for the release is missing from the manifest file
regex.target: 发布信息的manifest文件中缺少id属性

regex.source: The version attribute for the release is missing from the manifest file
regex.target: 发布信息的manifest文件中缺少version属性

regex.source: This plugin is already in the list for beta testing
regex.target: 此插件已在测试版列表中

regex.source: A manifest.json or manifest-beta.json file does not exist in the root directory of the repository. This plugin cannot be installed.
regex.target: 仓库的根目录中不存在manifest.json或manifest-beta.json文件。无法安装此插件。

regex.source: The manifest${usingBetaManifest ? "-beta" : ""}.json file in the root directory of the repository does not have a version number in the file. This plugin cannot be installed.
regex.target: 仓库根目录中的manifest${usingBetaManifest ? "-beta" : ""}.json文件中没有版本号。无法安装此插件。

regex.source: The manifest${usingBetaManifest ? "-beta" : ""}.json for this plugin indicates that the Obsidian version of the app needs to be ${primaryManifest.minAppVersion}, but this installation of Obsidian is ${import_obsidian7.apiVersion}.
regex.target: 此插件的manifest${usingBetaManifest ? "-beta" : ""}.json 文件表明，Obsidian应用程序的版本需要为 ${primaryManifest.minAppVersion}, 但当前安装的Obsidian版本为 ${import_obsidian7.apiVersion}。

regex.source: You will need to update your Obsidian to use this plugin or contact the plugin developer for more information.
regex.target: 您需要更新Obsidian以使用此插件，或联系插件开发者以获取更多信息。

regex.source: The release is not complete and cannot be download. main.js is missing from the Release
regex.target: 此版本不完整，无法下载。发布版中缺少main.js文件。

regex.source: Plugin has been reinstalled and reloaded.
regex.target: 插件已重新安装并重新加载。

regex.source: The plugin has been registered with BRAT.
The version of ${repositoryPath} is frozen, not updating.
There is an update available for ${primaryManifest.id} from version ${localManifestJson.version} to ${primaryManifest.version}.
regex.target: ${primaryManifest.id} 有可用更新，从版本 ${localManifestJson.version} 更新到 ${primaryManifest.version}.

regex.source: Could not locate the repository from the URL.
If you need to access private repositories, enter the personal access token here.
regex.target: 如果您需要访问私有存储库，请在此处输入个人访问令牌。

prependText:"Set a personal access token to increase rate limits for public repositories on GitHub. You can create one in "

regex.target: "然后将其添加到此处。请查阅文档以获取更多详情。"
